title: 5 tips for using Antigravity 2.0 on enterprise codebases, planning phase
summary: Antigravity 2.0 is a Google Cloud tool for using AI agents on enterprise codebases. The video covers five planning-phase tactics: linking multiple repositories into one workspace, organizing coding standards hierarchically, setting up sandboxing and allowlists for safety, using voice input for requirements, and using the /grill-me command to surface fuzzy requirements before execution.
